common.siteDescription: Find the best credit card for your spending in Egypt
common.disclaimer: This tool is for informational purposes only. Always verify terms directly with your bank before applying.

landing.heroSubtitle: Compare all credit cards in Egypt based on your actual spending and get personalized recommendations
landing.step1Desc: Share your monthly spending across categories like groceries, dining, and fuel
landing.step2Desc: Our algorithm calculates your potential savings with each card
landing.step3Desc: See the best cards ranked by your estimated annual savings
landing.feature1Desc: Compare cards from CIB, NBE, HSBC, QNB, and more
landing.feature2Desc: Recommendations based on your actual spending habits
landing.feature3Desc: Completely free to use, no registration required
landing.feature4Desc: Available in both English and Arabic

questionnaire.title: Find Your Best Card
questionnaire.incomeSubtitle: This helps us show cards you're eligible for
questionnaire.spendingSubtitle: Estimate how much you spend in each category per month
questionnaire.preferencesSubtitle: Select all benefits that are important to you
questionnaire.loungeAccessDesc: Complimentary access to airport lounges worldwide
questionnaire.travelInsuranceDesc: Coverage for trip cancellation, medical emergencies abroad
questionnaire.cashbackPreferenceDesc: Earn money back on your purchases
questionnaire.rewardsPreferenceDesc: Earn points redeemable for gifts, vouchers, or miles
questionnaire.lowAnnualFeeDesc: Prefer cards with minimal or no annual fees
questionnaire.zeroInstallmentsDesc: Buy now, pay later with zero interest installments
questionnaire.conciergeDesc: 24/7 personal assistant for travel, dining, and events
questionnaire.tierSubtitle: Which card level are you interested in?
questionnaire.tierAnyDesc: Show me all matching cards regardless of tier
questionnaire.tierPlatinumDesc: Premium cards with enhanced rewards and benefits

results.title: Your Card Recommendations
results.subtitle: Based on your spending of {totalSpending} EGP/month, we found {count} eligible cards
results.noResults: No eligible cards found for your profile. Try adjusting your income or preferences.
results.selectToCompare: Select up to 3 cards to compare
